description: You are a molecular biologist planning to subclone the human insulin coding sequence into an expression vector. Identify restriction enzyme recognition sites across the human insulin gene sequence (~/UGENE_Data/human_insulin_gene.gb) and annotate the sequence with these sites. Save the annotated GenBank file to ~/UGENE_Data/results/insulin_restriction_annotated.gb. Analyze the restriction map relative to the CDS boundaries to create a cloning strategy report at ~/UGENE_Data/results/cloning_strategy_report.txt. The report must include the total number of distinct restriction enzymes identified, a list of enzymes that cut within the CDS, a list of candidate enzymes that cut outside the CDS, and a recommended pair of two different enzymes for directional cloning with a brief justification.
